channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Polymarket Trader Who Won Big on Start of Iran War Betting Even Bigger on Impending Ceasefire
item.description: A Polymarket user named "NOTHINGEVERFRICKINGHAPPENS" was suspiciously lucky once, and clearly thinks they're about to get lucky again.

item.title: U.S. Senators Introduce Legislation to Ban Sports Betting on Prediction Markets
item.description: It would be a bipartisan action at a very partisan time.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for March 24, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for March 24, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for March 24, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1739 on March 24 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.
